decisions.summary: All PAN-1491 beads were already implemented and closed in prior sessions; this session is performing completion paperwork and submission.

Initial rebase onto origin/main failed with conflicts in workspace planning artifacts (.pan/continue.json, .pan/spec.vbrief.json) and roles/flywheel.md; aborted per PAN-1491 restart guidance and used merge/pan-done conflict path instead.

Merged origin/main into feature/pan-1491 to resolve pan-done rebase conflicts; kept PAN-1491 Flywheel-Affects-Criterion trailer and weight sorting in roles/flywheel.md while adopting main's --auto-start launch syntax.
Review cycle 12 returned CHANGES REQUESTED: requirements reviewer flagged vitest.config.ts CI worker-cap (maxWorkers: CI ? 1 : 4) as a fake-timers/no-workaround policy violation.
Removed the CI worker-cap from vitest.config.ts and ran the full suite with default worker parallelism; 6017 passed, 51 skipped, no OOM. The cap was leftover debt, not a needed workaround.

hazards.summary: Feature branch contains recent auto-commits and merges from other issues (PAN-1190/PAN-1675); pan done may encounter merge conflicts requiring resolution.
hazards.mitigation: Followed pan done failure guidance: merged origin/main, resolved conflicts preserving PAN-1491 changes, re-ran tests, pushed, and re-called pan done.

hazards.summary: If CI later OOMs without the worker cap, the real delay/retry/sleep test will need to be isolated and converted to fake timers rather than re-adding the cap.
hazards.mitigation: Monitor CI after merge; if OOM recurs, identify the offending test and convert it to vi.useFakeTimers() per repository policy instead of reintroducing the workaround.

resumePoint.description: Awaiting review re-run after fixing the vitest.config.ts worker-cap policy violation; if review passes again, no further action is needed.

sessionHistory.note: Verified all PAN-1491 beads closed, tests pass, and implementation complete; preparing to push and submit.
Merged origin/main into feature/pan-1491 to resolve pan-done rebase conflicts.
Review cycle 12 CHANGES REQUESTED: removed CI worker-cap workaround from vitest.config.ts and re-requested review.
